rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: High environmental score may reduce operational costs.
Low ESG score may increase capital costs.
suggestedActions: Set improvement targets for each ESG pillar.
Consider carbon offset programs for residual emissions.

description.short: Calculate minimum landfill area required for waste storage.
description.long: Calculate minimum landfill area required for waste storage.

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum landfill area required for waste storage.
short_i18n.tr: Atığı depolamak için gereken minimum deponi sahası yüzey alanını hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die minimale Deponiefläche, die für die Abfalllagerung erforderlich ist.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la surface minimale de décharge requise pour le stockage des déchets.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el área mínima de vertedero requerida para el almacenamiento de residuos.
short_i18n.ar: حساب الحد الأدنى لمساحة المكب المطلوبة لتخزين النفايات.
